name: LF3000 Low Fog

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: CADC2D53-B52B-423C-938A-B3DE1873FD52

comment: LF3000 Low Fog Machine: The LF3000 is a compact low fog machine that creates continuous low fog on the floor by using ultrasonic technology instead of dry ice. The main fuel is water supplemented with standard smoke fluid! It eliminates the need for Co2, dry ice or separate fog machines, with low using cost and no damage for environment. The LF3000 can be controlled with the on board digital display or DMX. Suitable for small to medium productions/events.
